name: Mistyfoot
description: Mistyfoot is a pale blue-gray she-cat with ice-blue eyes. She was born as Mistykit to Bluestar and Oakheart alongside her brother Stonekit and her sister Mosskit. Mistyfoot and her siblings were originally raised in ThunderClan by their mother Bluestar, but had to be given up to their father Oakheart in RiverClan. During the journey to RiverClan, Mosskit died of hypothermia. She is half-Clan, being half-RiverClan and half-ThunderClan.
creator: CrunchyCheetoeZ
